fixtures.description: Branded Dracotail opener: Dracotail Faimena + Dracotail Lukias + Fallen of the White Dragon + Branded Fusion + Blazing Cartesia. Expected to execute the Lukias-search-Mululu combo through Faimena fusion into Arthalion, chain-set Dracotail Flame/Horn/Sting via Lukias/Mululu GY-fusion-material triggers, then use Fallen of the White Dragon to special summon Ecclesia and the Dark Dragon. Pan was swapped out for Fallen of the White Dragon in the 2026-04-13 fixture audit — Pan needs a tribute and is dead in an opening hand.
